LAW AND MOTION 301, SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT STAYED TO ALLOW THE RESPONDENT OPPORTUNITY TO PURSUE ITS RIGHTS TO REIMBURSEMENT FROM THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT IF THE STATE CHOOSES TO DO SO. THE PARTIES SHALL SUBMIT A STATUS UPDATE NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 10, 2009 REGARDING WHAT ACTION IF ANY THE STATE HAS TAKEN TO PURSUE REIMBURSEMENT. THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR ON NOVEMBER 17, 2009 FOR HEARING TO DETERMINE WHETHER THE STAY SHOULD BE LIFTED OR CONTINUED. MS. STEELEY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: TAMARA WILLET-HARRISON, CSR # 4609

RULING - SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT STAYED TO ALLOW THE RESPONDENT OPPORTUNITY TO PURSUE ITS RIGHTS TO REIMBURSEMENT FROM THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT IF THE STATE CHOOSES TO DO SO. THE PARTIES SHALL SUBMIT A STATUS UPDATE NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 10, 2009 REGARDING WHAT ACTION IF ANY THE STATE HAS TAKEN TO PURSUE REIMBURSEMENT. THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR ON NOVEMBER 17, 2009 FOR HEARING TO DETERMINE WHETHER THE STAY SHOULD BE LIFTED OR CONTINUED. MS. STEELEY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Tamara Willet-Harrison, CSR # 4609 =301/PJB
